name: wealthview
description: WealthView static dashboard and API deployment bundle.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check api/aggregate.js && node --check api/history.js && node --check api/intelligence.js && node --check api/signals.js && node --check api/snapshot.js && node --check api/_treasurySignals.js && node --check lib/history.js && node --check lib/intelligence.js && node --check lib/sep41.js && node --check mcp-server.js && node --check stellar-portfolio-sdk.js && test -f dist/index.html && test -f dist/demo.html
scripts.bundle: zip -r wealthview-deploy-bundle.zip index.html demo.html favicon.ico CNAME DEPLOY_NOW.md README.md .gitignore .github package.json vercel.json stellar-portfolio-sdk.js api lib mcp-server.js mcp.json public scripts -x '.git/*' 'node_modules/*' 'dist/*' '.env*' '.vercel/*'
